answer: Okay, so one trending thing I've noticed recently is the rise of sustainable fashion. You know, like brands and people are trying to focus more on eco-friendly clothing, reusing materials, or even thrifting. I think it’s popular because, well, people are becoming more aware of environmental issues and want to make choices that align with those values. Plus, it’s kind of cool—like, wearing thrifted clothes or upcycled pieces makes you stand out in a creative way. Honestly, it impacts people by encouraging a shift away from fast fashion, which can be super wasteful, and also gets them to think more critically about what they buy. For example, I’ve seen my friends getting into thrifting, and it’s actually helped them save money while looking unique. So yeah, it’s a pretty positive trend overall.
title:
Discuss a current trend that you have observed.
What trend are you noticing?
Why is this trend popular?
How does it impact people?
